plan.title: Port the environment / toolchain verify gates (verify_tools / verify_hooks_installed / toolchain-check / verify_no_task_runtime) to TypeScript

narratives.Description: Port the four environment/toolchain probe gates -- scripts/verify_tools.py, scripts/verify_hooks_installed.py, scripts/toolchain-check.py, and scripts/verify_no_task_runtime.py -- to TypeScript with cache-off golden parity vs the Python oracle. These are leaf gates with no inter-dependency: verify_tools checks required CLIs are on PATH, verify_hooks_installed checks git core.hooksPath wiring, toolchain-check verifies the maintainer toolchain, and verify_no_task_runtime forbids a stray task-runtime import. Three-state exits (0 clean / 1 finding / 2 config error) are preserved exactly. Subprocess/gh capture (where present) uses Node execFile with explicit UTF-8 (#1366); the Python _safe_subprocess shim is NOT ported.
narratives.ImplementationPlan:
1. Create packages/core/src/verify-env with TS ports of the four probes, with vitest unit tests in the module directory covering each gate's clean / finding / config-error path.
2. Add packages/cli/src/verify-env-parity.ts that drives the TS functions and a python -c invocation of the frozen Python gates over shared fixtures and asserts byte-identical output (stdout + exit code) with cache off (the Python modules are the oracle and are NOT modified).
3. Wire the module into packages/core/src/index.ts, packages/core/package.json subpath exports, vitest.config.ts alias, tasks/ts.yml (verify-env-parity target into parity-all), and a CI golden-diff step.
narratives.UserStory: As a directive maintainer, I want the environment and toolchain verify gates available in TypeScript, so that the tool / hook / toolchain / no-task-runtime checks run on the TS engine with the same verdicts, messages, and exit codes as the Python modules.

narrative.Acceptance: Running the TS verify-env gates returns the same three-state exit code and the same diagnostic messages the Python verify_tools / verify_hooks_installed / toolchain-check / verify_no_task_runtime modules produce for the clean, finding, and config-error fixtures.
Running the verify-env-parity binary returns exit 0 and renders byte-identical output to the Python environment/toolchain-gate oracle with cache off.

expected_outputs: New packages/core/src/verify-env module with vitest unit tests
Byte-identical parity vs the four Python environment/toolchain gates under cache-off
swarm.missing_traces_justification: #1530 Wave-5 framework-internal TS port traced to GitHub issue #1783 and umbrella epic #1530; no specification.vbrief.json spec-section applies to maintainer tooling.

references.title: Issue #1783: feat(ts-migration): port the remaining verify/validate gates to TS (Wave 5)
